title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Hinduja Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Hinduja Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Hinduja Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Hinduja Healthcare:
Hinduja Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hinduja Healthcare!
